mapper.select: SELECT id, itinerary_id AS itineraryId, destination_id AS destinationId, spot_name AS spotName, latitude, longitude, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM itinerary_spot_candidate WHERE itinerary_id = #{itineraryId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, itinerary_id AS itineraryId, destination_id AS destinationId, spot_name AS spotName, latitude, longitude, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM itinerary_spot_candidate WHERE itinerary_id = #{itineraryId} AND destination_id = #{destinationId}
